I specialize in turning ideas into functional, visually engaging digital experiences—managing projects from concept to launch with a focus on detail, user experience, and results.
Whether I'm developing a responsive website, designing a brand identity, or leading a team through a complex project, I bring a balance of creativity, strategy, and technical expertise to every challenge.

Product Catalog

Structured digital catalog layout.

I maintain and developed the website BuiltSmart.homes, a business focused on prefab modular home construction. My role involved maintaining and optimizing the site’s structure, design, and performance to effectively showcase modern, energy-efficient housing solutions. I enhanced the user experience by implementing custom layouts, interactive floor plan features, and lead capture forms tailored for prospective homeowners and real estate developers. I also ensured mobile responsiveness, improved SEO visibility. Through consistent updates and collaboration with the marketing team, the website became a central hub for generating high-quality leads and educating customers about BuiltSmart’s modular home options.

Web Design Showcase

Web Design Showcase

Single Product Sales Page

Specific Niched Market

Restaurant Website

NFT Website

Online Delivery System

A high-converting, single-product landing page designed for maximum impact. Features include compelling product visuals, persuasive copy, benefits breakdown, testimonials, countdown timers, and a streamlined checkout via WooCommerce or Stripe. Mobile-responsive, SEO-friendly, and optimized for speed—perfect for launching or promoting a flagship item with focused marketing.

A feature-rich gaming hub with custom game review sections, player leaderboards, blog integration, user accounts, discussion forums, and embedded video content. Includes WooCommerce for game merchandise, mobile-responsive design, SEO-ready structure, and social media integration—perfectly tailored for gaming communities and fans. Built entirely using WordPress themes and plugins.

Crafted for a focused audience, this WordPress site delivers tailored content, product listings, and resources for a specific niche (e.g., eco-products, pet grooming, or specialty teas). Features include blog integration, custom contact forms, lead capture, SEO optimization, responsive design, and WooCommerce for niche-specific product sales.

A visually appetizing website featuring digital menus, online reservations, location map, and photo galleries. Includes customer testimonials, blog for updates or events, social media integration, and mobile optimization. Supports food ordering via WooCommerce or third-party plugins—ideal for showcasing ambiance, dishes, and driving both dine-in and delivery traffic.

A modern NFT showcase platform featuring wallet integration, digital galleries, minting page, and collection overviews. Includes blog for project updates, FAQ section, roadmap display, and social media links. Built with NFT-friendly plugins and responsive design—ideal for creators to promote, sell, and educate audiences about their NFT projects.

A full-featured delivery website supporting real-time ordering, location-based services, and order tracking. Includes product/menu listings, delivery time slots, customer accounts, SMS/email notifications, and payment gateway integration. Built with WooCommerce and delivery plugins, it’s mobile-optimized and ideal for food, grocery, or local goods delivery businesses.
